title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Straits Remain Unnavigable as Tanker Market Adjusts to Alternatives - Tensions in the Middle East have continued to intensify and the situation is becoming increasingly fragile.
